content: TASK-039 interrupt done: overview no longer uses the wide zone/layer separation that made Wiz/FirebaseAuth look too far away. 2D overview uses compact zone lane spacing, and 3D overview flattens semantic layer height; Stack/layer views retain their layer-oriented spacing. Next: continue TASK-009/TASK-010 acceptance work; consider 3D full icon-grid parity and subgraph overlay parity in 3D if the human asks. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
